FertilisedSpacewormEggs.title: Space worm eggs (fertilised)
FertilisedSpacewormEggs.description: Space Worm eggs are now a staple diet for humans, gross but nutritional. May hatch if left long enough.

UnfertilisedChickenEggs.title: Chicken eggs (unfertilised)
UnfertilisedChickenEggs.description: Chicken eggs can be eaten as a source of nutrition. This egg is unfertilised and will not hatch.

FertilisedChickenEggs.title: Chicken eggs (fertilised)
FertilisedChickenEggs.description: Chicken eggs can be eaten as a source of nutrition. This egg is fertilised and may hatch if left long enough.
